content: The incremental, search-based knowledge accumulation process described for the 2025 meta-learning memory consolidation agent is itself a form of embodied curiosity-driven meta-learning for the agent researching AI agents. We can frame the recursive search for agent knowledge in this prompt as a test case for what a 2025 memory consolidation agent is designed to do: incrementally pruning, contextualizing, and consolidating sparse partial memory fragments about a core concept into a coherent usable schema.
